items.title: Overspender Controls
items.action: Set spend caps for low-ROI, high-token users and require manager review for premium model access.
items.expected_effect: Estimated 12% reduction in monthly AI spend and improved ROI.

items.title: Business-Value Tagging
items.action: Require business-value tagging before approving premium model usage on features.
items.expected_effect: Estimated 6% reduction in AI spend on low-value features.

items.title: Model Routing Optimization
items.action: Route low-complexity tasks to lower-cost models and restrict premium models to high-value features.
items.expected_effect: Estimated 10% reduction in model-related AI spend.

items.title: Budget Monitoring Alerts
items.action: Implement monthly budget alerts by provider, model, team, and user segment.
items.expected_effect: Enables early detection of budget overruns; no direct spend reduction.
